{{CargoRelic
|name=Chair of Busby
|rank=Blue
|affct=FTH
|birthday=07-17
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.85%)
|description=On Jul 17, 1702, this cursed chair killed its first owner.

Bruce strangled his father-in-law who sat on his chair. When he was given the death sentence, he made a curse, "Those who sit on my chair shall die." After that, the cursed chair took 63 lives. They all died from accidents a few hours after sitting on this chair.

[Victim List]

The cleaner, who stood on the chair to do cleaning, fell and died. British airman Baylord died in a car accident. Construction worker fell from the roof and died. All four squadrons of the Royal Canadian Air Force died. The deliveryman, who sat on this chair, had a car accident on the way back.
|fame=24
|art=30
|fth=46
|civ=26
|tech=28
|ss1=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail HP +20<br>Lotteries Drawn: 600/600
|ss2=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail HP +40<br>Lotteries Drawn: 600/600
|ss3=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail HP +60<br>Lotteries Drawn: 600/600
|ss4=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail HP +100<br>Lotteries Drawn: 600/600
|ss7=Per 20 Jinx Points, Snail HP +100<br>Lotteries Drawn: 600/600<br>Snail +500 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail ATK +20
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:FTH Relics]]
[[Category:Blue FTH Relics]]
[[Category:Quarry Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Imp Boost]]
